calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Peggy Huang, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Peggy Huang, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Dec-04-2018 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-29-2018 Continued To Oct-02-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
